creator: gjb@FreeBSD.org
text:
On Sun, Aug 26, 2012 at 11:00:23PM +0000, Joe Barbish wrote:
> >Description:
> burncd no longer works as of changes made to 9.0. 
> http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=bin/160979
> 
> The handbook section "19.6.3 burncd" needs
> to be removed. The rest of the handbook should be scaned for word
> burncd and those places also removed.
> 

Since 8.x and 7.4-RELEASE are still supported, these references should
not be removed.  Instead, notes mentioning relevant necessary changes
for 9.x should be added.

Glen
